project_type: pnpm monorepo with React 19 shared-ui package using Tailwind CSS
build_system: pnpm + turbo, tsc for shared-ui build
verification_instructions: 1. Run pnpm --filter @quant/shared-ui typecheck 2. Run pnpm --filter @quant/shared-ui test 3. Verify exports in src/index.ts
setup_instructions: pnpm install from root (already done on this branch)
environment_constraints: OPEN_INTERNET - full access. Node 22. No framer-motion installed; use CSS animations/transitions or add framer-motion as dependency.
contribution_requirements: <=500 LOC per PR. Tests use React Testing Library. No real audio/video APIs in tests (all mocked). Export from packages/shared-ui/src/index.ts. Follow existing component patterns (Tailwind CSS classes, aria-labels, FC components).
key_patterns: Components are React.FC with explicit Props interface. Styles use Tailwind CSS utility classes inline. Tests use vitest describe/it/expect with @testing-library/react render/screen/fireEvent. Test files live in __tests__/ folders or src/__tests__/. vitest.config uses jsdom environment. Components export from barrel index.ts files.
directory_structure: packages/shared-ui/src/components/ contains all UI components. Each multi-file component has its own folder (e.g., Media/, Chat/, Feed/, Shell/). Simple components are single .tsx files. Tests live in __tests__/ directories. packages/quant-live/ contains the session engine with types for LiveSessionState, TranscriptSegment, etc.
